items.title: MATCHA: a fast and energy-efficient accelerator for fully homomorphic encryption over the torus.
items.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption over the Torus (TFHE) allows arbitrary computations to happen directly on ciphertexts using homomorphic logic gates. However, each TFHE gate on state-of-the-art hardware platforms such as GPUs and FPGAs is extremely slow ($>0.2ms$). Moreover, even the latest FPGA-based TFHE accelerator cannot achieve high energy efficiency, since it frequently invokes expensive double-precision floating point FFT and IFFT kernels. In this paper, we propose a fast and energy-efficient accelerator, MATCHA, to process TFHE gates. MATCHA supports aggressive bootstrapping key unrolling to accelerate TFHE gates without decryption errors by approximate multiplication-less integer FFTs and IFFTs, and a pipelined datapath. Compared to prior accelerators, MATCHA improves the TFHE gate processing throughput by $2.3\times$, and the throughput per Watt by $6.3\times$.
items.abstract_zh: 环面完全同态加密 (TFHE) 允许使用同态逻辑门直接在密文上进行任意计算。然而，最先进的硬件平台（例如 GPU 和 FPGA）上的每个 TFHE 门都非常慢（$>0.2ms$）。此外，即使是最新的基于FPGA的TFHE加速器也无法实现高能效，因为它频繁调用昂贵的双精度浮点FFT和IFFT内核。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速且节能的加速器 MATCHA 来处理 TFHE 门。 MATCHA 支持积极的引导密钥展开，通过近似无乘法整数 FFT 和 IFFT 以及流水线数据路径来加速 TFHE 门，而不会出现解密错误。与之前的加速器相比，MATCHA 将 TFHE 门处理吞吐量提高了 2.3 倍，每瓦吞吐量提高了 6.3 倍。

items.title: FaSe: fast selective flushing to mitigate contention-based cache timing attacks.
Accelerating nonlinear DC circuit simulation with reinforcement learning.
items.abstract: DC analysis is the foundation for nonlinear electronic circuit simulation. Pseudo transient analysis (PTA) methods have gained great success among various continuation algorithms. However, PTA tends to be computationally intensive without careful tuning of parameters and proper stepping strategies. In this paper, we harness the latest advancing in machine learning to resolve these challenges simultaneously. Particularly, an active learning is leveraged to provide a fine initial solver environment, in which a TD3-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) is implemented to accelerate the simulation on the fly. The RL agent is strengthen with dual agents, priority sampling, and cooperative learning to enhance its robustness and convergence. The proposed algorithms are implemented in an out-of-the-box SPICElike simulator, which demonstrated a significant speedup: up to 3.1X for the initial stage and 234X for the RL stage.
items.abstract_zh: 直流分析是非线性电子电路仿真的基础。伪瞬态分析（PTA）方法在各种连续算法中取得了巨大成功。然而，如果没有仔细调整参数和适当的步进策略，PTA 往往是计算密集型的。在本文中，我们利用机器学习的最新进展来同时解决这些挑战。特别是，利用主动学习来提供良好的初始求解器环境，其中实施基于 TD3 的强化学习 (RL) 来加速动态模拟。强化学习代理通过双代理、优先采样和合作学习来增强其鲁棒性和收敛性。所提出的算法在开箱即用的类似 SPICE 的模拟器中实现，显示出显着的加速：初始阶段高达 3.1 倍，RL 阶段高达 234 倍。

items.title: Flexible chip placement via reinforcement learning: late breaking results.
DA PUF: dual-state analog PUF.
QuantumNAT: quantum noise-aware training with noise injection, quantization and normalization.
QOC: quantum on-chip training with parameter shift and gradient pruning.
BlueScale: a scalable memory architecture for predictable real-time computing on highly integrated SoCs.
HCG: optimizing embedded code generation of simulink with SIMD instruction synthesis.
GLite: a fast and efficient automatic graph-level optimizer for large-scale DNNs.
DARPT: defense against remote physical attack based on TDC in multi-tenant scenario.
DeepGate: learning neural representations of logic gates.
The SODA approach: leveraging high-level synthesis for hardware/software co-design and hardware specialization: invited.
Glimpse: mathematical embedding of hardware specification for neural compilation.
Fast and scalable human pose estimation using mmWave point cloud.
Response time analysis for dynamic priority scheduling in ROS2.
items.abstract: Robot Operating System (ROS) is the most popular framework for developing robotics software. Typically, robotics software is safety-critical and employed in real-time systems requiring timing guarantees. Since the first generation of ROS provides no timing guarantee, the recent release of its second generation, ROS2, is necessary and timely, and has since received immense attention from practitioners and researchers. Unfortunately, the existing analysis of ROS2 showed the peculiar scheduling strategy of ROS2 executor, which severely affects the response time of ROS2 applications. This paper proposes a deadline-based scheduling strategy for the ROS2 executor. It further presents an analysis for an end-to-end response time of ROS2 workload (processing chain) and an evaluation of the proposed scheduling strategy for real workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 机器人操作系统（ROS）是用于开发机器人软件的最流行的框架。通常，机器人软件对于安全至关重要，并用于需要定时保证的实时系统中。由于第一代ROS没有时间保证，近期第二代ROS2的发布是必要且及时的，受到了从业者和研究人员的极大关注。不幸的是，现有的ROS2分析表明ROS2执行器特有的调度策略，严重影响了ROS2应用程序的响应时间。本文提出了一种基于截止日期的 ROS2 执行器调度策略。它还进一步分析了 ROS2 工作负载（处理链）的端到端响应时间，并对所提出的实际工作负载调度策略进行了评估。

items.title: Pipette: efficient fine-grained reads for SSDs.
Improving GNN-based accelerator design automation with meta learning.
MIME: adapting a single neural network for multi-task inference with memory-efficient dynamic pruning.
VIPR-PCB: a machine learning based golden-free PCB assurance framework.
Efficient maximum data age analysis for cause-effect chains in automotive systems.
Handling non-unitaries in quantum circuit equivalence checking.
Energy efficient data search design and optimization based on a compact ferroelectric FET content addressable memory.
Domain knowledge-infused deep learning for automated analog/radio-frequency circuit parameter optimization.
AL-PA: cross-device profiled side-channel attack using adversarial learning.
mflowgen: a modular flow generator and ecosystem for community-driven physical design: invited.
ASAP: reconciling asynchronous real-time operations and proofs of execution in simple embedded systems.
Timed speculative attacks exploiting store-to-load forwarding bypassing cache-based countermeasures.
FHDnn: communication efficient and robust federated learning for AIoT networks.
Timing macro modeling with graph neural networks.
Hardware-efficient stochastic rounding unit design for DNN training: late breaking results.
Efficient access scheme for multi-bank based NTT architecture through conflict graph.
Placement initialization via a projected eigenvector algorithm: late breaking results.
Trusting the trust anchor: towards detecting cross-layer vulnerabilities with hardware fuzzing.
Optimizing quantum circuit synthesis for permutations using recursion.
YOLoC: deploy large-scale neural network by ROM-based computing-in-memory using residual branch on a chip.
GaBAN: a generic and flexibly programmable vector neuro-processor on FPGA.
Efficient timing propagation with simultaneous structural and pipeline parallelisms: late breaking results.
Thermal-aware drone battery management: late breaking results.
Improving compute in-memory ECC reliability with successive correction.
AxoNN: energy-aware execution of neural network inference on multi-accelerator heterogeneous SoCs.
Heuristic adaptability to input dynamics for SpMM on CPUs.
SCAIE-V: an open-source SCAlable interface for ISA extensions for RISC-V processors.
NobLSM: an LSM-tree with non-blocking writes for SSDs.
Mixed-granularity parallel coarse-grained reconfigurable architecture.
VWR2A: a very-wide-register reconfigurable-array architecture for low-power embedded devices.
Towards a formally verified hardware root-of-trust for data-oblivious computing.
Worst-case dynamic power distribution network noise prediction using convolutional neural network.
items.abstract: Worst-case dynamic PDN noise analysis is an essential step in PDN sign-off to ensure the performance and reliability of chips. However, with the growing PDN size and increasing scenarios to be validated, it becomes very time- and resource-consuming to conduct full-stack PDN simulation to check the worst-case noise for different test vectors. Recently, various works have proposed machine learning based methods for supply noise prediction, many of which still suffer from large training overhead, inefficiency, or non-scalability. Thus, this paper proposed an efficient and scalable framework for the worst-case dynamic PDN noise prediction. The framework first reduces the spatial and temporal redundancy in the PDN and input current vector, and then employs efficient feature extraction as well as a novel convolutional neural network architecture to predict the worst-case dynamic PDN noise. Experimental results show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms the commercial tool and the state-of-the-art machine learning method with only 0.63--1.02% mean relative error and 25--69× speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 最坏情况动态PDN噪声分析是PDN签核的重要步骤，以确保芯片的性能和可靠性。然而，随着 PDN 规模的不断增长以及需要验证的场景不断增加，进行全栈 PDN 仿真以检查不同测试向量的最坏情况噪声变得非常耗时和资源消耗。最近，各种工作提出了基于机器学习的电源噪声预测方法，其中许多方法仍然存在训练开销大、效率低或不可扩展的问题。因此，本文提出了一种用于最坏情况动态 PDN 噪声预测的高效且可扩展的框架。该框架首先减少 PDN 和输入电流向量中的空间和时间冗余，然后采用高效的特征提取以及新颖的卷积神经网络架构来预测最坏情况的动态 PDN 噪声。实验结果表明，所提出的框架始终优于商业工具和最先进的机器学习方法，平均相对误差仅为 0.63--1.02%，加速率为 25--69 倍。

items.title: TAAS: a timing-aware analytical strategy for AQFP-capable placement automation.
HWST128: complete memory safety accelerator on RISC-V with metadata compression.
LeHDC: learning-based hyperdimensional computing classifier.
HDLock: exploiting privileged encoding to protect hyperdimensional computing models against IP stealing.
items.abstract: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) is facing infringement issues due to straightforward computations. This work, for the first time, raises a critical vulnerability of HDC, an attacker can reverse engineer the entire model, only requiring the unindexed hypervector memory. To mitigate this attack, we propose a defense strategy, namely HDLock, which significantly increases the reasoning cost of encoding. Specifically, HDLock adds extra feature hypervector combination and permutation in the encoding module. Compared to the standard HDC model, a two-layer-key HDLock can increase the adversarial reasoning complexity by 10 order of magnitudes without inference accuracy loss, with only 21% latency overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 超维计算（HDC）由于计算简单而面临侵权问题。这项工作首次提出了 HDC 的一个严重漏洞，攻击者可以对整个模型进行逆向工程，只需要未索引的超向量内存。为了减轻这种攻击，我们提出了一种防御策略，即 HDLock，它显着增加了编码的推理成本。具体来说，HDLock 在编码模块中添加了额外的特征超向量组合和排列。与标准 HDC 模型相比，两层密钥 HDLock 可以将对抗性推理复杂度提高 10 个数量级，而不会损失推理精度，并且延迟开销仅为 21%。

items.title: CLIMBER: defending phase change memory against inconsistent write attacks.
Enabling fast uncertainty estimation: accelerating bayesian transformers via algorithmic and hardware optimizations.
Optimizing quantum circuit placement via machine learning.
Chiplet actuary: a quantitative cost model and multi-chiplet architecture exploration.
Contrastive quant: quantization makes stronger contrastive learning.
MetaZip: a high-throughput and efficient accelerator for DEFLATE.
PPATuner: pareto-driven tool parameter auto-tuning in physical design via gaussian process transfer learning.
DETERRENT: detecting trojans using reinforcement learning.
LPCA: learned MRC profiling based cache allocation for file storage systems.
Optimizing parallel PREM compilation over nested loop structures.
ADEPT: automatic differentiable DEsign of photonic tensor cores.
Differentiable-timing-driven global placement.
A timing engine inspired graph neural network model for pre-routing slack prediction.
items.abstract: Fast and accurate pre-routing timing prediction is essential for timing-driven placement since repetitive routing and static timing analysis (STA) iterations are expensive and unacceptable. Prior work on timing prediction aims at estimating net delay and slew, lacking the ability to model global timing metrics. In this work, we present a timing engine inspired graph neural network (GNN) to predict arrival time and slack at timing endpoints. We further leverage edge delays as local auxiliary tasks to facilitate model training with increased model performance. Experimental results on real-world open-source designs demonstrate improved model accuracy and explainability when compared with vanilla deep GNN models.
items.abstract_zh: 快速、准确的预布线时序预测对于时序驱动布局至关重要，因为重复布线和静态时序分析 (STA) 迭代成本高昂且不可接受。先前的时序预测工作旨在估计网络延迟和转换，缺乏对全局时序指标进行建模的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种受时序引擎启发的图神经网络（GNN）来预测时序端点的到达时间和松弛。我们进一步利用边缘延迟作为本地辅助任务，以促进模型训练并提高模型性能。现实世界开源设计的实验结果表明，与普通深度 GNN 模型相比，模型准确性和可解释性得到了提高。

items.title: DELTA: DEsigning a stealthy trigger mechanism for analog hardware trojans and its detection analysis.
Apple vs. EMA: electromagnetic side channel attacks on apple CoreCrypto.
Power-aware pruning for ultrafast, energy-efficient, and accurate optical neural network design.
items.abstract: With the rapid progress of the integrated nanophotonics technology, the optical neural network (ONN) architecture has been widely investigated. Although the ONN inference is fast, conventional densely connected network structures consume large amounts of power in laser sources. We propose a novel ONN design method that finds an ultrafast, energy-efficient, and accurate ONN structure. The key idea is power-aware edge pruning that derives the near-optimal numbers of edges in the entire network. Optoelectronic circuit simulation demonstrates the correct functional behavior of the ONN. Furthermore, experimental evaluations using tensor-flow show the proposed methods achieved 98.28% power reduction without significant loss of accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着集成纳米光子技术的快速进步，光学神经网络（ONN）架构得到了广泛的研究。尽管 ONN 推理速度很快，但传统的密集连接网络结构会消耗大量激光源功率。我们提出了一种新颖的 ONN 设计方法，可以找到超快、节能且准确的 ONN 结构。关键思想是功率感知的边缘修剪，它可以得出整个网络中接近最佳的边缘数量。光电电路仿真演示了 ONN 的正确功能行为。此外，使用张量流的实验评估表明，所提出的方法实现了 98.28% 的功耗降低，而精度没有显着损失。

items.title: Accurate timing prediction at placement stage with look-ahead RC network.
InfoX: an energy-efficient ReRAM accelerator design with information-lossless low-bit ADCs.
Processing-in-SRAM acceleration for ultra-low power visual 3D perception.
Hyperdimensional hashing: a robust and efficient dynamic hash table.
Enabling hard constraints in differentiable neural network and accelerator co-exploration.
Zhuyi: perception processing rate estimation for safety in autonomous vehicles.
GuardNN: secure accelerator architecture for privacy-preserving deep learning.
items.abstract: This paper proposes GuardNN, a secure DNN accelerator that provides hardware-based protection for user data and model parameters even in an untrusted environment. GuardNN shows that the architecture and protection can be customized for a specific application to provide strong confidentiality and integrity guarantees with negligible overhead. The design of the GuardNN instruction set reduces the TCB to just the accelerator and allows confidentiality protection even when the instructions from a host cannot be trusted. GuardNN minimizes the overhead of memory encryption and integrity verification by customizing the off-chip memory protection for the known memory access patterns of a DNN accelerator. GuardNN is prototyped on an FPGA, demonstrating effective confidentiality protection with ~3% performance overhead for inference.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 GuardNN，这是一种安全的 DNN 加速器，即使在不可信的环境中，也能为用户数据和模型参数提供基于硬件的保护。 GuardNN 表明，可以针对特定应用程序定制架构和保护，以提供强大的机密性和完整性保证，而开销可以忽略不计。 GuardNN 指令集的设计将 TCB 简化为加速器，即使来自主机的指令不可信，也可以实现机密性保护。 GuardNN 通过针对 DNN 加速器的已知内存访问模式定制片外内存保护，最大限度地减少内存加密和完整性验证的开销。 GuardNN 在 FPGA 上进行原型设计，展示了有效的机密性保护，推理性能开销约为 3%。

items.title: Compressive sensing based asymmetric semantic image compression for resource-constrained IoT system.
Shfl-BW: accelerating deep neural network inference with tensor-core aware weight pruning.
Pref-X: a framework to reveal data prefetching in commercial in-order cores.
Neural computation for robust and holographic face detection.
items.abstract: Face detection is an essential component of many tasks in computer vision with several applications. However, existing deep learning solutions are significantly slow and inefficient to enable face detection on embedded platforms. In this paper, we propose HDFace, a novel framework for highly efficient and robust face detection. HDFace exploits HyperDimensional Computing (HDC) as a neurally-inspired computational paradigm that mimics important brain functionalities towards high-efficiency and noise-tolerant computation. We first develop a novel technique that enables HDC to perform stochastic arithmetic computations over binary hypervectors. Next, we expand these arithmetic for efficient and robust processing of feature extraction algorithms in hyperspace. Finally, we develop an adaptive hyperdimensional classification algorithm for effective and robust face detection. We evaluate the effectiveness of HDFace on large-scale emotion detection and face detection applications. Our results indicate that HDFace provides, on average, 6.1X (4.6X) speedup and 3.0X (12.1X) energy efficiency as compared to neural networks running on CPU (FPGA), respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 人脸检测是计算机视觉中许多任务的重要组成部分，具有多种应用。然而，现有的深度学习解决方案在嵌入式平台上实现人脸检测速度明显缓慢且效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 HDFace，一种用于高效且鲁棒的人脸检测的新颖框架。 HDFace 利用超维计算 (HDC) 作为一种受神经启发的计算范例，模仿重要的大脑功能，实现高效和耐噪声计算。我们首先开发了一种新技术，使 HDC 能够在二进制超向量上执行随机算术计算。接下来，我们扩展这些算法，以实现超空间中特征提取算法的高效和鲁棒处理。最后，我们开发了一种自适应超维分类算法，用于有效且鲁棒的人脸检测。我们评估 HDFace 在大规模情感检测和人脸检测应用中的有效性。我们的结果表明，与在 CPU (FPGA) 上运行的神经网络相比，HDFace 平均分别提供 6.1 倍 (4.6 倍) 的加速和 3.0 倍 (12.1 倍) 的能源效率。

items.title: A fast and low-cost comparison-free sorting engine with unary computing: late breaking results.
GNN-based concentration prediction for random microfluidic mixers.
items.abstract: Recent years have witnessed significant advances brought by microfluidic biochips in automating biochemical processing. Accurate preparation of fluid samples with microfluidic mixers is a fundamental step in various biomedical applications, where concentration prediction and generation are critical. Finite element analysis (FEA) is the most commonly used simulation method for accurate concentration prediction of a given biochip design, such as COMSOL. However, the FEA simulation process is time-consuming with poor scalability for large biochip sizes. This paper proposes a new concentration prediction method based on the graph neural networks (GNN), which efficiently and accurately predicts the generated concentration by random microfluidic mixers of different sizes. Experimental results show that compared with the state-of-the-art method, the proposed GNN-based simulation method obtains a reduction of 88% in terms of errors of predicted concentration, which validates the effectiveness of the proposed GNN model.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，微流控生物芯片在自动化生化处理方面取得了重大进展。使用微流体混合器准确制备流体样品是各种生物医学应用中的基本步骤，其中浓度预测和生成至关重要。有限元分析 (FEA) 是最常用的模拟方法，用于精确预测给定生物芯片设计的浓度，例如 COMSOL。然而，FEA 仿真过程非常耗时，而且对于大尺寸生物芯片的可扩展性较差。本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的新浓度预测方法，该方法可以高效、准确地预测不同尺寸的随机微流控混合器生成的浓度。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的基于 GNN 的模拟方法在预测浓度方面的误差降低了 88％，这验证了所提出的 GNN 模型的有效性。

items.title: EMS: efficient memory subsystem synthesis for spatial accelerators.
TAIM: ternary activation in-memory computing hardware with 6T SRAM array.
Automating hardware security property generation: invited.
GENERIC: highly efficient learning engine on edge using hyperdimensional computing.
PatterNet: explore and exploit filter patterns for efficient deep neural networks.
PARIS and ELSA: an elastic scheduling algorithm for reconfigurable multi-GPU inference servers.
items.abstract: In cloud machine learning (ML) inference systems, providing low latency to end-users is of utmost importance. However, maximizing server utilization and system throughput is also crucial for ML service providers as it helps lower the total-cost-of-ownership. GPUs have oftentimes been criticized for ML inference usages as its massive compute and memory throughput is hard to be fully utilized under low-batch inference scenarios. To address such limitation, NVIDIA's recently announced Ampere GPU architecture provides features to "reconfigure" one large, monolithic GPU into multiple smaller "GPU partitions". Such feature provides cloud ML service providers the ability to utilize the reconfigurable GPU not only for large-batch training but also for small-batch inference with the potential to achieve high resource utilization. In this paper, we study this emerging GPU architecture with reconfigurability to develop a high-performance multi-GPU ML inference server. Our first proposition is a sophisticated partitioning algorithm for reconfigurable GPUs that systematically determines a heterogeneous set of multi-granular GPU partitions, best suited for the inference server's deployment. Furthermore, we co-design an elastic scheduling algorithm tailored for our heterogeneously partitioned GPU server which effectively balances low latency and high GPU utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 在云机器学习 (ML) 推理系统中，为最终用户提供低延迟至关重要。然而，最大限度地提高服务器利用率和系统吞吐量对于机器学习服务提供商也至关重要，因为它有助于降低总拥有成本。 GPU 在 ML 推理用途上经常受到批评，因为其海量计算和内存吞吐量在小批量推理场景下很难得到充分利用。为了解决这一限制，NVIDIA 最近发布的 Ampere GPU 架构提供了将一个大型单片 GPU“重新配置”为多个较小的“GPU 分区”的功能。此功能使云 ML 服务提供商能够利用可重新配置的 GPU 不仅进行大批量训练，而且还可以进行小批量推理，并有可能实现高资源利用率。在本文中，我们研究了这种具有可重构性的新兴 GPU 架构，以开发高性能的多 GPU ML 推理服务器。我们的第一个提议是用于可重新配置 GPU 的复杂分区算法，该算法系统地确定最适合推理服务器部署的异构多粒度 GPU 分区集。此外，我们共同设计了一种针对异构分区 GPU 服务器量身定制的弹性调度算法，有效平衡了低延迟和高 GPU 利用率。

items.title: Voltage prediction of drone battery reflecting internal temperature.
items.abstract: Drones are commonly used in mission-critical applications, and the accurate estimation of available battery capacity before flight is critical for reliable and efficient mission planning. To this end, the battery voltage should be predicted accurately prior to launching a drone. However, in drone applications, a rise in the battery's internal temperature changes the voltage significantly and leads to challenges in voltage prediction. In this paper, we propose a battery voltage prediction method that takes into account the battery's internal temperature to accurately estimate the available capacity of the drone battery. To this end, we devise a temporal temperature factor (TTF) metric that is calculated by accumulating time series data about the battery's discharge history. We employ a machine learning-based prediction model, reflecting the TTF metric, to achieve high prediction accuracy and low complexity. We validated the accuracy and complexity of our model with extensive evaluation. The results show that the proposed model is accurate with less than 1.5% error and readily operates on resource-constrained embedded devices.
items.abstract_zh: 无人机通常用于关键任务应用，在飞行前准确估计可用电池容量对于可靠、高效的任务规划至关重要。为此，应在发射无人机之前准确预测电池电压。然而，在无人机应用中，电池内部温度的升高会显着改变电压，并给电压预测带来挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种电池电压预测方法，该方法考虑电池的内部温度，以准确估计无人机电池的可用容量。为此，我们设计了一个时间温度因子（TTF）指标，该指标是通过累积有关电池放电历史的时间序列数据来计算的。我们采用基于机器学习的预测模型，反映 TTF 指标，以实现高预测精度和低复杂度。我们通过广泛的评估验证了模型的准确性和复杂性。结果表明，所提出的模型准确，误差小于 1.5%，并且易于在资源受限的嵌入式设备上运行。

items.title: Waveform-based performance analysis of RISC-V processors: late breaking results.
Silicon validation of LUT-based logic-locked IP cores.
LOCK&ROLL: deep-learning power side-channel attack mitigation using emerging reconfigurable devices and logic locking.
GEML: GNN-based efficient mapping method for large loop applications on CGRA.
Efficiency attacks on spiking neural networks.
Exploiting data locality in memory for ORAM to reduce memory access overheads.
Bipolar vector classifier for fault-tolerant deep neural networks.
TailCut: improving performance and lifetime of SSDs using pattern-aware state encoding.
Don't open row: rethinking row buffer policy for improving performance of non-volatile memories.
Beyond local optimality of buffer and splitter insertion for AQFP circuits.
CarM: hierarchical episodic memory for continual learning.
A time-to-first-spike coding and conversion aware training for energy-efficient deep spiking neural network processor design.
ReSMA: accelerating approximate string matching using ReRAM-based content addressable memory.
Eventor: an efficient event-based monocular multi-view stereo accelerator on FPGA platform.
HIMap: a heuristic and iterative logic synthesis approach.
Conditional address propagation: an efficient defense mechanism against transient execution attacks.
GraphRing: an HMC-ring based graph processing framework with optimized data movement.
iMARS: an in-memory-computing architecture for recommendation systems.
A scalable SIMD RISC-V based processor with customized vector extensions for CRYSTALS-kyber.
SS-LRU: a smart segmented LRU caching.
Tailor: removing redundant operations in memristive analog neural network accelerators.
ASTERS: adaptable threshold spike-timing neuromorphic design with twin-column ReRAM synapses.
VStore: in-storage graph based vector search accelerator.
Hammer: a modular and reusable physical design flow tool: invited.
NovelRewrite: node-level parallel AIG rewriting.
Alleviating datapath conflicts and design centralization in graph analytics acceleration.
Xplace: an extremely fast and extensible global placement framework.
Sniper: cloud-edge collaborative inference scheduling with neural network similarity modeling.
Floorplanning with graph attention.
items.abstract: Floorplanning has long been a critical physical design task with high computation complexity. Its key objective is to determine the initial locations of macros and standard cells with optimized wirelength for a given area constraint. This paper presents Flora, a graph attention-based floorplanner to learn an optimized mapping between circuit connectivity and physical wirelength, and produce a chip floorplan using efficient model inference. Flora has been integrated with two state-of-the-art mixed-size placers. Experimental studies using both academic benchmarks and industrial designs demonstrate that compared to state-of-the-art mixed-size placers alone, Flora improves placement runtime by 18%, with 2% wirelength reduction on average.
items.abstract_zh: 布局规划长期以来一直是计算复杂度很高的关键物理设计任务。其主要目标是确定宏和标准单元的初始位置，并针对给定面积约束优化线长。本文介绍了 Flora，一种基于图注意力的布局规划器，用于学习电路连接和物理线长之间的优化映射，并使用高效的模型推理生成芯片布局规划。 Flora 已与两个最先进的混合尺寸放置器集成。使用学术基准和工业设计的实验研究表明，与单独使用最先进的混合尺寸布局器相比，Flora 将布局运行时间提高了 18%，线长平均缩短了 2%。

items.title: ReGNN: a ReRAM-based heterogeneous architecture for general graph neural networks.
PHANES: ReRAM-based photonic accelerator for deep neural networks.
Pursuing more effective graph spectral sparsifiers via approximate trace reduction.
PIM-DH: ReRAM-based processing-in-memory architecture for deep hashing acceleration.
Partition and place finite element model on wafer-scale engine.
EBSP: evolving bit sparsity patterns for hardware-friendly inference of quantized deep neural networks.
SATO: spiking neural network acceleration via temporal-oriented dataflow and architecture.
An energy-efficient seizure detection processor using event-driven multi-stage CNN classification and segmented data processing with adaptive channel selection.
Thermal-aware optical-electrical routing codesign for on-chip signal communications.
Raven: a novel kernel debugging tool on RISC-V.
You only search once: on lightweight differentiable architecture search for resource-constrained embedded platforms.
CDB: critical data backup design for consumer devices with high-density flash based hybrid storage.
PathFinder: side channel protection through automatic leaky paths identification and obfuscation.
Formal verification of modular multipliers using symbolic computer algebra and boolean satisfiability.
Multi-electrostatic FPGA placement considering SLICEL-SLICEM heterogeneity and clock feasibility.
items.abstract: Modern field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) contain heterogeneous resources, including CLB, DSP, BRAM, IO, etc. A Configurable Logic Block (CLB) slice is further categorized to SLICEL and SLICEM, which can be configured as specific combinations of instances in {LUT, FF, distributed RAM, SHIFT, CARRY}. Such kind of heterogeneity challenges the existing FPGA placement algorithms. Meanwhile, limited clock routing resources also lead to complicated clock constraints, causing difficulties in achieving clock feasible placement solutions. In this work, we propose a heterogeneous FPGA placement framework considering SLICEL-SLICEM heterogeneity and clock feasibility based on a multi-electrostatic formulation. We support a comprehensive set of the aforementioned instance types with a uniform algorithm for wirelength, routability, and clock optimization. Experimental results on both academic and industrial benchmarks demonstrate that we outperform the state-of-the-art placers in both quality and efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 现代现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）包含异构资源，包括CLB、DSP、BRAM、IO等。可配置逻辑块（CLB）片又分为SLICEL和SLICEM，可以配置为{LUT、FF、分布式RAM、SHIFT、CARRY}中实例的特定组合。这种异构性对现有的 FPGA 布局算法提出了挑战。同时，有限的时钟布线资源也导致复杂的时钟约束，导致难以实现时钟可行的布局解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种异构 FPGA 布局框架，考虑了 SLICEL-SLICEM 异构性和基于多静电公式的时钟可行性。我们通过统一的线长、可路由性和时钟优化算法支持上述一整套实例类型。学术和工业基准的实验结果表明，我们在质量和效率方面都优于最先进的布局器。

items.title: EcoFusion: energy-aware adaptive sensor fusion for efficient autonomous vehicle perception.
items.abstract: Autonomous vehicles use multiple sensors, large deep-learning models, and powerful hardware platforms to perceive the environment and navigate safely. In many contexts, some sensing modalities negatively impact perception while increasing energy consumption. We propose EcoFusion: an energy-aware sensor fusion approach that uses context to adapt the fusion method and reduce energy consumption without affecting perception performance. EcoFusion performs up to 9.5% better at object detection than existing fusion methods with approximately 60% less energy and 58% lower latency on the industry-standard Nvidia Drive PX2 hardware platform. We also propose several context-identification strategies, implement a joint optimization between energy and performance, and present scenario-specific results.
items.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车使用多个传感器、大型深度学习模型和强大的硬件平台来感知环境并安全导航。在许多情况下，一些传感方式会对感知产生负面影响，同时增加能源消耗。我们提出了 EcoFusion：一种能量感知传感器融合方法，它使用上下文来适应融合方法并减少能耗，而不影响感知性能。在行业标准 Nvidia Drive PX2 硬件平台上，EcoFusion 在对象检测方面的性能比现有融合方法提高了 9.5%，能耗减少了约 60%，延迟降低了 58%。我们还提出了几种上下文识别策略，实现能量和性能之间的联合优化，并呈现特定场景的结果。

items.title: Write or not: programming scheme optimization for RRAM-based neuromorphic computing.
SEALS: sensitivity-driven efficient approximate logic synthesis.
GNNIE: GNN inference engine with load-balancing and graph-specific caching.
Accelerating and pruning CNNs for semantic segmentation on FPGA.
Secure by construction: addressing security vulnerabilities introduced during high-level synthesis: invited.
Efficient ensembles of graph neural networks.
Generative self-supervised learning for gate sizing: invited.
In-situ self-powered intelligent vision system with inference-adaptive energy scheduling for BNN-based always-on perception.
NAX: neural architecture and memristive xbar based accelerator co-design.
Improving LUT-based optimization for ASICs.
items.abstract: LUT-based optimization techniques are finding new applications in synthesis of ASIC designs. Intuitively, packing logic into LUTs provides a better balance between functionality and structure in logic optimization. On this basis, the LUT-engine framework [1] was introduced to enhance the ASIC synthesis. In this paper, we present key improvements, at both algorithmic and flow levels, making a much stronger LUT-engine. We restructure the flow of LUT-engine, to benefit from a heterogeneous mixture of LUT sizes, and revisit its requirements for maximum scalability. We propose a dedicated LUT mapper for the new flow, based on FlowMap, natively balancing LUT-count and NAND2-count for a wide range LUT sizes. We describe a specialized Boolean factoring technique, exploiting the fanin bounds in LUT networks, resulting in a very fast LUT-based AIG minimization. By using the proposed methodology, we improve 9 of the best area results in the ongoing EPFL synthesis competition. Integrated in a complete EDA flow for ASICs, the new LUT-engine performs well on a set of 87 benchmarks: -4.60% area and -3.41% switching power at +5% runtime, compared to the baseline flow without LUT-based optimizations, and -3.02% area and -2.54% switching power with -1% runtime, compared to the original LUT-engine.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 LUT 的优化技术正在 ASIC 设计综合中找到新的应用。直观上，将逻辑打包到 LUT 中可以在逻辑优化中提供功能和结构之间更好的平衡。在此基础上，引入了LUT引擎框架[1]来增强ASIC综合。在本文中，我们在算法和流程层面提出了关键改进，从而打造了更强大的 LUT 引擎。我们重组了 LUT 引擎的流程，以便从 LUT 大小的异构混合中受益，并重新审视其对最大可扩展性的要求。我们为新流程提出了一个基于 FlowMap 的专用 LUT 映射器，可以原生平衡各种 LUT 大小的 LUT 计数和 NAND2 计数。我们描述了一种专门的布尔因式分解技术，利用 LUT 网络中的 fanin 边界，从而实现非常快速的基于 LUT 的 AIG 最小化。通过使用所提出的方法，我们改进了正在进行的 EPFL 合成竞赛中的 9 个最佳区域结果。新的 LUT 引擎集成在 ASIC 的完整 EDA 流程中，在 87 个基准测试中表现良好：与没有基于 LUT 的优化的基准流程相比，在 +5% 运行时间下，面积为 -4.60%，开关功率为 -3.41%；与原始 LUT 引擎相比，运行时间为 -1%，面积为 -3.02%，开关功率为 -3.02%。

items.title: HDPG: hyperdimensional policy-based reinforcement learning for continuous control.
Y-architecture-based flip-chip routing with dynamic programming-based bend minimization.
A distributed approach to silicon compilation: invited.
Accelerator design with decoupled hardware customizations: benefits and challenges: invited.
Towards collaborative intelligence: routability estimation based on decentralized private data.
items.abstract: Applying machine learning (ML) in design flow is a popular trend in EDA with various applications from design quality predictions to optimizations. Despite its promise, which has been demonstrated in both academic researches and industrial tools, its effectiveness largely hinges on the availability of a large amount of high-quality training data. In reality, EDA developers have very limited access to the latest design data, which is owned by design companies and mostly confidential. Although one can commission ML model training to a design company, the data of a single company might be still inadequate or biased, especially for small companies. Such data availability problem is becoming the limiting constraint on future growth of ML for chip design. In this work, we propose an Federated-Learning based approach for well-studied ML applications in EDA. Our approach allows an ML model to be collaboratively trained with data from multiple clients but without explicit access to the data for respecting their data privacy. To further strengthen the results, we co-design a customized ML model FLNet and its personalization under the decentralized training scenario. Experiments on a comprehensive dataset show that collaborative training improves accuracy by 11% compared with individual local models, and our customized model FLNet significantly outperforms the best of previous routability estimators in this collaborative training flow.
items.abstract_zh: 在设计流程中应用机器学习 (ML) 是 EDA 的流行趋势，具有从设计质量预测到优化的各种应用。尽管其前景已在学术研究和工业工具中得到证明，但其有效性在很大程度上取决于大量高质量训练数据的可用性。事实上，EDA 开发人员对最新设计数据的访问非常有限，这些数据归设计公司所有，而且大多是机密的。虽然可以委托设计公司进行机器学习模型训练，但单个公司的数据可能仍然不充分或存在偏差，尤其是对于小公司而言。这种数据可用性问题正在成为芯片设计机器学习未来发展的限制因素。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于联邦学习的方法，用于 EDA 中经过充分研究的 ML 应用程序。我们的方法允许机器学习模型与来自多个客户的数据进行协作训练，但无需显式访问数据以尊重他们的数据隐私。为了进一步强化结果，我们共同设计了定制的ML模型FLNet及其在去中心化训练场景下的个性化。在综合数据集上的实验表明，与单独的本地模型相比，协作训练的准确性提高了 11%，并且我们的定制模型 FLNet 在此协作训练流程中显着优于以前最好的可路由性估计器。

items.title: QuiltNet: efficient deep learning inference on multi-chip accelerators using model partitioning.
A fast and scalable qubit-mapping method for noisy intermediate-scale quantum computers.
items.abstract: This paper presents an efficient qubit-mapping method that redesigns a quantum circuit to overcome the limitations of qubit connectivity. We propose a recursive graph-isomorphism search to generate the scalable initial mapping. In the main mapping, we use an adaptive look-ahead window search to resolve the connectivity constraint within a short runtime. Compared with the state-of-the-art method [15], our proposed method reduced the number of additional gates by 23% on average and the runtime by 68% for the three largest benchmark circuits. Furthermore, our method improved circuit stability by reducing the circuit depth and thus can be a step forward towards fault tolerance.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种有效的量子位映射方法，该方法重新设计量子电路以克服量子位连接的限制。我们提出了一种递归图同构搜索来生成可扩展的初始映射。在主映射中，我们使用自适应前视窗口搜索来解决短时间内的连接约束。与最先进的方法[15]相比，我们提出的方法将三个最大基准电路的附加门数量平均减少了 23%，运行时间减少了 68%。此外，我们的方法通过减少电路深度提高了电路稳定性，因此可以向容错迈出一步。

items.title: Equivalence checking paradigms in quantum circuit design: a case study.
A length adaptive algorithm-hardware co-design of transformer on FPGA through sparse attention and dynamic pipelining.
items.abstract: Transformers are considered one of the most important deep learning models since 2018, in part because it establishes state-of-the-art (SOTA) records and could potentially replace existing Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Despite the remarkable triumphs, the prolonged turnaround time of Transformer models is a widely recognized roadblock. The variety of sequence lengths imposes additional computing overhead where inputs need to be zero-padded to the maximum sentence length in the batch to accommodate the parallel computing platforms. This paper targets the field-programmable gate array (FPGA) and proposes a coherent sequence length adaptive algorithm-hardware co-design for Transformer acceleration. Particularly, we develop a hardware-friendly sparse attention operator and a length-aware hardware resource scheduling algorithm. The proposed sparse attention operator brings the complexity of attention-based models down to linear complexity and alleviates the off-chip memory traffic. The proposed length-aware resource hardware scheduling algorithm dynamically allocates the hardware resources to fill up the pipeline slots and eliminates bubbles for NLP tasks. Experiments show that our design has very small accuracy loss and has 80.2 × and 2.6 × speedup compared to CPU and GPU implementation, and 4 × higher energy efficiency than state-of-the-art GPU accelerator optimized via CUBLAS GEMM.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 被认为是 2018 年以来最重要的深度学习模型之一，部分原因是它建立了最先进的 (SOTA) 记录，并且有可能取代现有的深度神经网络 (DNN)。尽管取得了显著成就，但 Transformer 模型的周转时间过长是一个广泛认可的障碍。序列长度的变化会带来额外的计算开销，其中输入需要用零填充到批次中的最大句子长度，以适应并行计算平台。本文针对现场可编程门阵列（FPGA），提出了一种用于 Transformer 加速的相干序列长度自适应算法-硬件协同设计。特别是，我们开发了一种硬件友好的稀疏注意算子和一种长度感知的硬件资源调度算法。所提出的稀疏注意力算子将基于注意力的模型的复杂性降低到线性复杂性，并减轻了片外内存流量。所提出的长度感知资源硬件调度算法动态分配硬件资源以填充管道槽并消除 NLP 任务的气泡。实验表明，我们的设计具有非常小的精度损失，并且与 CPU 和 GPU 实现相比具有 80.2 倍和 2.6 倍的加速，并且比通过 CUBLAS GEMM 优化的最先进的 GPU 加速器高 4 倍的能效。

items.title: SMART: on simultaneously marching racetracks to improve the performance of racetrack-based main memory.
Verifying SystemC TLM peripherals using modern C++ symbolic execution tools.
High-level design methods for hardware security: is it the right choice? invited.
Adaptive neural recovery for highly robust brain-like representation.
BlueSeer: AI-driven environment detection via BLE scans.
SoftSNN: low-cost fault tolerance for spiking neural network accelerators under soft errors.
O'clock: lock the clock via clock-gating for SoC IP protection.
Towards resilient analog in-memory deep learning via data layout re-organization.
libcrpm: improving the checkpoint performance of NVM.
Using machine learning to optimize graph execution on NUMA machines.
authors: Hiago Mayk G. de A. Rocha

items.title: PIPF-DRAM: processing in precharge-free DRAM.
A cross-layer approach to cognitive computing: invited.
Self adaptive reconfigurable arrays (SARA): learning flexible GEMM accelerator configuration and mapping-space using ML.
A scalable symbolic simulation tool for low power embedded systems.
ABNN2: secure two-party arbitrary-bitwidth quantized neural network predictions.
SALO: an efficient spatial accelerator enabling hybrid sparse attention mechanisms for long sequences.
The larger the fairer?: small neural networks can achieve fairness for edge devices.
items.abstract: Along with the progress of AI democratization, neural networks are being deployed more frequently in edge devices for a wide range of applications. Fairness concerns gradually emerge in many applications, such as face recognition and mobile medical. One fundamental question arises: what will be the fairest neural architecture for edge devices? By examining the existing neural networks, we observe that larger networks typically are fairer. But, edge devices call for smaller neural architectures to meet hardware specifications. To address this challenge, this work proposes a novel Fairness- and Hardware-aware Neural architecture search framework, namely FaHaNa. Coupled with a model freezing approach, FaHaNa can efficiently search for neural networks with balanced fairness and accuracy, while guaranteed to meet hardware specifications. Results show that FaHaNa can identify a series of neural networks with higher fairness and accuracy on a dermatology dataset. Target edge devices, FaHaNa finds a neural architecture with slightly higher accuracy, 5.28x smaller size, 15.14% higher fairness score, compared with MobileNetV2; meanwhile, on Raspberry PI and Odroid XU-4, it achieves 5.75x and 5.79x speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能民主化的进展，神经网络越来越频繁地部署在边缘设备中，以实现广泛的应用。在人脸识别、移动医疗等许多应用中，公平性问题逐渐显现。出现了一个基本问题：边缘设备最公平的神经架构是什么？通过检查现有的神经网络，我们发现较大的网络通常更公平。但是，边缘设备需要更小的神经架构来满足硬件规格。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作提出了一种新颖的公平和硬件感知神经架构搜索框架，即 FaHaNa。结合模型冻结方法，FaHaNa 可以高效搜索神经网络，平衡公平性和准确性，同时保证满足硬件规格。结果表明，FaHaNa 可以在皮肤科数据集上以更高的公平性和准确性识别一系列神经网络。针对边缘设备，FaHaNa 发现与 MobileNetV2 相比，精度稍高、尺寸缩小 5.28 倍、公平性得分提高 15.14% 的神经架构；同时，在 Raspberry PI 和 Odroid XU-4 上，它实现了 5.75 倍和 5.79 倍的加速。

items.title: Algorithm/architecture co-design for energy-efficient acceleration of multi-task DNN.
items.abstract: Real-world AI applications, such as augmented reality or autonomous driving, require processing multiple CV tasks simultaneously. However, the enormous data size and the memory footprint have been a crucial hurdle for deep neural networks to be applied in resource-constrained devices. To solve the problem, we propose an algorithm/architecture co-design. The proposed algorithmic scheme, named SqueeD, reduces per-task weight and activation size by 21.9x and 2.1x, respectively, by sharing those data between tasks. Moreover, we design architecture and dataflow to minimize DRAM access by fully utilizing benefits from SqueeD. As a result, the proposed architecture reduces the DRAM access increment and energy consumption increment per task by 2.2x and 1.3x, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 现实世界的人工智能应用，例如增强现实或自动驾驶，需要同时处理多个计算机视觉任务。然而，巨大的数据量和内存占用一直是深度神经网络在资源受限设备中应用的关键障碍。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了算法/架构协同设计。所提出的算法方案名为 SqueeD，通过在任务之间共享这些数据，将每个任务的权重和激活大小分别减少了 21.9 倍和 2.1 倍。此外，我们设计架构和数据流，充分利用 SqueeD 的优势，最大限度地减少 DRAM 访问。因此，所提出的架构将每个任务的 DRAM 访问增量和能耗增量分别减少了 2.2 倍和 1.3 倍。

items.title: Effective zero compression on ReRAM-based sparse DNN accelerators.
items.abstract: For efficient DNN inference Resistive RAM (ReRAM) crossbars have emerged as a promising building block to compute matrix multiplication in an area- and power-efficient manner. To improve inference throughput sparse models can be deployed on the ReRAM-based DNN accelerator. While unstructured pruning maintains both high accuracy and high sparsity, it performs poorly on the crossbar architecture due to the irregular locations of pruned weights. Meanwhile, due to the non-ideality of ReRAM cells and the high cost of ADCs, matrix multiplication is usually performed at a fine granularity, called Operation Unit (OU), along both wordline and bitline dimensions. While fine-grained, OU- based row compression (ORC) has recently been proposed to increase weight compression ratio, significant performance potentials are still left on the table due to sub-optimal weight mappings. Thus, we propose a novel weight mapping scheme that effectively clusters zero weights via OU-level filter reordering, hence improving the effective weight compression ratio. We also introduce a weight recovery scheme to further improve accuracy or compression ratio, or both. Our evaluation with three popular DNNs demonstrates that the proposed scheme effectively eliminates redundant weights in the crossbar array and hence ineffectual computation to achieve 3.27--4.26× of array compression ratio with negligible accuracy loss over the baseline ReRAM-based DNN accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: 为了实现高效的 DNN 推理，电阻 RAM (ReRAM) 交叉开关已成为一种很有前景的构建块，可以以节省面积和功耗的方式计算矩阵乘法。为了提高推理吞吐量，稀疏模型可以部署在基于 ReRAM 的 DNN 加速器上。虽然非结构化剪枝保持了高精度和高稀疏性，但由于剪枝权重的位置不规则，它在 crossbar 架构上表现不佳。同时，由于 ReRAM 单元的非理想性和 ADC 的高成本，矩阵乘法通常在字线和位线维度上以细粒度（称为操作单元（OU））执行。虽然最近提出了基于 OU 的细粒度行压缩 (ORC) 来提高权重压缩比，但由于次优权重映射，仍然存在显着的性能潜力。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的权重映射方案，通过OU级过滤器重新排序有效地聚类零权重，从而提高有效的权重压缩比。我们还引入了权重恢复方案，以进一步提高准确性或压缩比，或两者兼而有之。我们对三种流行的 DNN 的评估表明，所提出的方案有效地消除了交叉阵列中的冗余权重，从而消除了无效的计算，以实现 3.27--4.26× 的阵列压缩比，并且与基于 ReRAM 的基线 DNN 加速器相比，精度损失可以忽略不计。
